# Turnadus — Pokémon VGC & Champions Companion

> Free companion app for competitive Pokémon (VGC and Pokémon Champions). Calculates speed tiers, turn order, damage, and provides meta analysis.

## What Turnadus does

- **Turn order calculator** (`/game`): Given two teams, calculates which Pokémon moves first under any combination of field conditions — weather, terrain, Tailwind, Trick Room, Choice Scarf, paralysis, mega evolutions, stat stages, and species abilities (Swift Swim, Chlorophyll, etc.)
- **Speed tier reference** (`/tiers`): Complete table of every Pokémon's speed stat at all nature/EV thresholds. Filterable by Champions legal list or generation.
- **Boosted speed tiers** (`/boost-tiers`): Speed values after Dragon Dance (+1), Agility (+2), Choice Scarf, and Tailwind.
- **Team builder** (`/build`): Full EV/IV editor with meta-sorted moves and items, damage calculator, and speed comparisons vs the meta.
- **Meta analysis** (`/meta`): Usage stats for Pokémon Champions Regulation M-A — top moves, items, abilities, and teammate pairings per Pokémon.
- **Tournament teams** (`/teams`): Recent tournament winning teams.

## Formats supported

- **Pokémon Champions M-A**: Community format with 187 legal Pokémon and a compressed EV system (0–32 per stat, 66 total)
- **VGC Regulation I** (`gen9vgc2026regi`): Official Pokémon VGC format via Smogon stats

## Data sources

- Species data: `@pkmn/dex` (bundled)
- Damage calc: `@smogon/calc` (bundled)
- Smogon meta: Live Smogon chaos JSON (proxied server-side, 24h cache)
- Champions meta: Manually maintained snapshot at `/champions-meta.json`
- Tournament data: Limitless tournament results at `/recent-teams.json`

## Speed calculation

Speed at level 50: `floor((2 × base + iv + floor(ev / 4)) × 0.5 + 5) × natureMult`

Effective speed modifiers applied in order: nature → scarf (×1.5) → paralysis (×0.5) → weather ability (×2) → Proto/Quark Drive (×1.5) → Tailwind (×2) → Trick Room (reversal) → speed stages

## Tech

SvelteKit SPA, TypeScript, hosted on Vercel. Source: https://github.com/BendikOA/speedcheck

## Site

https://turnadus.com
